# RepoSentinel MCP Documentation Index

Use this file to discover the available RepoSentinel documentation before exploring further.

## Start Here

- README: ../README.md
  Overview, setup, safety model, skills pack, and example workflow.

- Agent operating manual: ../AGENTS.md
  Required read order, engineering rules, security rules, workflow, and Git rules.

- Tool policy: ../TOOLS.md
  Allowed MCP tools, disallowed actions, capability boundaries, and future tool rules.

- Agent soul: ../SOUL.md
  RepoSentinel tone, priorities, and operating boundaries.

## MCP Setup

- MCP clients: clients.md
  Local stdio and Streamable HTTP setup examples for OpenAI Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Claude Desktop, Gemini CLI, Cline/Roo/Windsurf-style clients, and MCP Inspector.

- MCP tool contracts: mcp-tool-contracts.md
  Tool inputs, outputs, output rules, and schema expectations.

- Deployment: deployment.md
  Free public npm distribution, production HTTP deployment, Docker, environment variables, verification, and current limits.

## Design And Safety

- Architecture: architecture.md
  Server structure, schemas, tools, policies, skills, and data flow.

- Security model: security-model.md
  Read-only safety model, redaction, filesystem boundaries, and skill audit boundaries.

- Threat model: threat-model.md
  Main threats, mitigations, and residual risks.

- Skill routing design: skill-routing-design.md
  Route manifest fields, workflow phases, routing inputs, and workflow intent.

- Official docs integration: official-docs-integration.md
  How RepoSentinel routes agents to current official documentation.

- Roadmap: roadmap.md
  Planned improvements and future capabilities.

## Built-In Skills

- reposentinel-orchestrator: ../skills/reposentinel-orchestrator/SKILL.md
- python-backend-quality: ../skills/python-backend-quality/SKILL.md
- python-mcp-server-quality: ../skills/python-mcp-server-quality/SKILL.md
- enterprise-code-quality: ../skills/enterprise-code-quality/SKILL.md
- nextjs-security-review: ../skills/nextjs-security-review/SKILL.md
- ai-app-security-review: ../skills/ai-app-security-review/SKILL.md
- docs-claims-evidence-review: ../skills/docs-claims-evidence-review/SKILL.md
- refactor-with-tests: ../skills/refactor-with-tests/SKILL.md
- github-issue-pr-workflow: ../skills/github-issue-pr-workflow/SKILL.md
- official-docs-grounding: ../skills/official-docs-grounding/SKILL.md
- skill-supply-chain-auditor: ../skills/skill-supply-chain-auditor/SKILL.md

## Recommended Agent Workflow

1. Read README, AGENTS, TOOLS, and this index.
2. Configure the MCP server using docs/clients.md.
3. Call detect_project on the target project.
4. Call route_skills with the user task and detected project.
5. Follow workflowPhases, recommendedToolSequence, skillActivationOrder, and qualityGates.
6. Run relevant audit tools before edits in existing projects.
7. Do not claim secure, production-ready, enterprise-grade, or fully tested without evidence.
